case_title: COMMUNICATION SERVICE CENTER VS SIMPSON, CHARLES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY COMMUNICATION SERVICE CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, CHARLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, CHARLES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMMUNICATION SERVICE CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMPSON, CHARLES $2,778.80 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,828.80, THE PARTIES AGREE THAT DEFENDANT WILL PAY 10% PER YEAR INTEREST ON ANY REMAINING BALANCE.
